{{Quote|It's a difficult weapon to use (the shape and weight make it unwieldy for those of my stature) but, with practice, it is a formidable and beautiful piece of weaponry.|[[Credman]]|<ref name="GFT" />}}
The '''rantok''' was a traditional one- or two-handed blade used by the [[Ka'hren]] people.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

It was a meter-and-a-half sword where the thick straight blade covered four fifths of the length, and the wooden hilt is the rest. An up-thrust crossguard was placed to each side of the hilt. On the flat side of the blade, there was a small quillion used to catch enemy blades.<ref name="air" />

The [[Unfyr/Legends|Unfyr]] warriors used rantoks as both military and ceremonial people. Other Ka'hrens also preferred rantoks to ranged weapons. However, the introduction of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] led to obsolescence of rantoks (except among the Unfyrs, who were devoted to their rantoks).<ref name="air" />

The rantoks were resurrected during the [[Rebellion era]] when history scholar [[Kaltor Naklian]] rediscovered the Unfyr traditions and culture. Particularly Naklian found a well-preserved rantok next to the writings of prophets of Unfyr god [[Ni'Shaw]], which he considered a sign to create the [[Ni'Shaw-Dak Ministry|Ni'Shaw-Dak]] religion. Ni'Shaw-Dak followers often learned to wield rantoks.<ref name="air" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer working for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] attacked a [[Valarian Syndicate|Valarian]] [[Unidentified warehouse (Rantok sword)|warehouse]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to steal a valuable rantok sword for Jabba.<ref name="SWG:G">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|G-5PO|Tatooine}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Rantoks appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
